entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00169) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00169 TO THE HRACCESS INDEFINITE DELIVERY INDEFINITE QUANTITY (IDIQ) CONTRACT, HSTS01-08-D-HRM010, IS TO AUTHORIZE CONTINUED SYSTEMS TRANSITION PLANNING AND DATA CENTER MIGRATION SUPPORT THROUGH JANUARY 1, 2016 AS MUTUALLY AGREED BETWEEN LOCKHEED MARTING AND THE TSA. AUTHORIZED PERFORMANCE IS EXECUTED UNDER CLIN SERIES 7027 "HRACCESS SYSTEM (HRIT) TRANSITION" AND FUNDED UNDER TASK ORDER HSTS01-15-J-HRM094.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: HUMAN RESOURCES CONSULTING SERVICES (2007), HUMAN RESOURCES AND EXECUTIVE SEARCH CONSULTING SERVICES (2002)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00170) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00170 TO THE HRACCESS INDEFINITE DELIVERY INDEFINITE QUANTITY (IDIQ) CONTRACT, HSTS01-08-D-HRM010, IS TO CHANGE THE KEY PERSONNEL. AUTHORIZED PERFORMANCE IS EXECUTED UNDER CLIN SERIES 7027 "HRACCESS SYSTEM (HRIT) TRANSITION" AND FUNDED UNDER TASK ORDER HSTS01-15-J-HRM094.

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00175) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00175 TO THE HRACCESS INDEFINITE DELIVERY INDEFINITE QUANTITY (IDIQ) CONTRACT, HSTS01-08-D-HRM010, IS TO CHANGE VETTING REQUIREMENTS AND REDUCE MEDICAL HOLD TIMES TO 45 DAYS.

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00176) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00176 TO THE HRACCESS IDIQ CONTRACT, HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO DOCUMENT THE AGREEMENT REACHED BETWEEN TSA AND LOCKHEED MARTIN RELATED TO THE CERTIFIED REQUEST FOR EQUITABLE ADJUSTMENT (REA) SUBMITTED ON 9/24/15 AND UPDATED ON 11/5/15 FOR COST IMPACTS RESULTING FROM THE PERSONAL IDENTIFY VERIFICATION (PIV) SOLUTION CHANGE AS WELL AS AUTHORIZATION OF CONTINUED IMPLEMENTATION PERFORMANCE UNDER CLIN SERIES X021AF. FUNDING WILL BE OBLIGATED VIA THE EXECUTION OF BILATERAL MODIFICATION P00020 TO THE OPTION 6 TASK ORDER HSTS01-15-J-HRM019.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: HUMAN RESOURCES CONSULTING SERVICES (2007), HUMAN RESOURCES AND EXECUTIVE SEARCH CONSULTING SERVICES (2002)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00177 TO THE HRACCESS IDIQ CONTRACT, HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS EXERCISE OPTION PERIOD 7 IN ACCORDANCE WITH TSA AMS CLAUSE 3.2.4-35 "OPTION TO EXTEND THE TERM OF THE CONTRACT (FEB 2003)."
